title: $2 off $15, $4 off $30, $9 off $65, $15 off $120, $25 off $209, $40 off $329, $55 off $449 Spend (in USD) @ AliExpress
body:
Deal: $2 off $15, $4 off $30, $9 off $65, $15 off $120, $25 off $209, $40 off $329, $55 off $449 Spend (in USD) @ AliExpress

[starbearer] Thanks! I have like 2-3 things to buy, just waiting for a good upsized TCB offer ~15% CB or so to pull the trigger
[Wiadro] cant wait to use my new aliexpress account, after being perma-banned for returning too many items in 2026
[whyisave] How many items is that?
I had to return my 1st ever item, a few weeks ago, after 15+ years of AliExpressin'
[Wiadro] like 10 or so, mostly because they ended up being way different from what they were selling - size, quality, not matching description
priced between $10 and $300.
We regret to inform you that your account appeal has been rejected. This means your account will remain disabled.
You can still manage existing orders, browse our products and add them to the shopping cart. Other functions are not currently supported.
If you wish to place an order, we recommend the following procedure. To create a new account, please use a different phone number/email address and another device.
[MeesusEff] Hmm I've returned way more than 10, small value items that are too crappy quality, wrong description etc which they let me keep. Nothing over $15 though.
Recent batches were listing's of 4pcs of cushion covers and they only send one. I've got enough free ones now that I don't need to buy anymore lol.
[Wiadro] @MeesusEff: Live chat rep said they doing a lot more scrutiny on returns.
I googled the wording from the suspension email and it was replicated in a lot of Reddit posts from 2025/2026
[Clear] After thousands of orders I've only ever had to return once.
[Clear] The crossing buttons that were trending at Gatcha Gatcha last year. I made multiple large orders with a a single seller and each order of 10-12 only had 1-3 genuine with the rest being very, very bad quality knock offs that didn't even work.
I ended up scamming the seller back, as I kept all the genuine and shipped back the fakes ones in one lot. Due to my account's good standing I received the refund the moment it was scanned into Auspost. I could see that the seller disputed the case a couple of weeks later but it was too late.
[bdl] @Clear: You Gotcha Gotcha the Gatcha Gatcha scammer scammer
[Wiadro] When you're the head buyer for multiple businesses, you go through a lot of returns to find the good stuff.
[carrawa] They were still there for me three weeks ago unless it has gone kaput since then.
[Clear] BundleDeals2 had the old discount up until a week ago. Now it's the crappy BundleDeals3.
